title: [Creative Couture, Interiors]
description: Honeycomb-crafted shelves are interspersed across the ivy-strewn walls, the mixed woods covered with decorative pieces spaced between tiny fauna carved from soapstone.  A low wooden platform stands at the center of the room, encircled by terracotta pots and vessels of colorful stained glass.  Set against the back wall is a tiled mosaic of a rotund capybara, the lackadaisical mammal sitting in a flourishing orangery alongside a small nightjar.
